TextENGNew: ``What's wrong, Chiaki-san?``
``Hey, Machi-chan, check it out.@k@vS20/00/VTT_chiaki3003. Doesn't it look like storms are coming?``
``Maybe so...``
Chiaki-san was leaning practically sideways to peer out the window, so I looked up at the sky.
And she was right about that. The sky was looking a bit dark. Still, the sunset was able to paint a wide area in a bright, vermillion hue. It was beautiful.
``Hey, Akutagawa-san.@k@vS20/00/VTT_machiko3004. Can I open the window for just a sec?``
``Yeah, sure.``
The driver Akutagawa undid the lock, then I opened the backseat window.
As soon as I did, I could hear the faintly echoing chorus of the higurashi, and a cool breeze blew some fresh air into the car.
``Beautiful...``
I could never see anything like this back in the city where I lived. This was the great big sky in the truest sense.
There were no annoying buildings to block the view, and the glow of the sunset was able to reach everything I could see.
``Hey Chiaki-san, take a look over here. Isn't it a fantastic view~?``
``Yeah, it truly is...``
Chiaki-san smiled bitterly as she looked up at the sky from behind my back. And I could feel the loneliness in her voice as she said that.
``The higurashi are singing, the birds are flying, and the trees are massive.@k@vS20/00/VTT_chiaki3006. ...I can hardly believe there's a ghost town out here.``
``Ghost town.``
Hearing those words reminded me of what we came out here to do.
That's right. Nobody lives out here anymore...
``Hey, Otobe-kun.@k@vS20/00/VTT_machiko3009. Do you know why nobody lives in this village anymore?``
``...@k@vS20/41/VTT_otobe3030.Well, I dunno.@k@vS20/41/VTT_otobe3031. I just know some magazine listed it as an occult spot...``
Otobe-kun was sitting in the front passenger seat, gazing at the outside scenery as he gave that half-hearted answer.
Somehow, he didn't seem all that interested in the place where we were headed... It seemed like his thoughts were elsewhere.
``How about you, Chiaki-san?``
``Same here, I don't know much.@k@vS20/00/VTT_chiaki3008. Just that there was some terrible accident a long time ago...``
``Haha, I see.@k@vS20/00/VTT_akuta3003. So you youngsters don't know about the Great Hinamizawa Disaster, do you?``
``? ...Akutagawa-san, do you know something?``
``Yeah, it happened about 20 years ago.@k@vS20/00/VTT_akuta3005. It caused a major uproar at the time.``
``Uproar...?``
I leaned forward and looked at the driver's seat. Akutagawa-san continued to focus on his driving, but nodded at me through the rear view mirror.
``Before the disaster, Hinamizawa was just a small Japanese village of no particular interest.@k@vS20/00/VTT_akuta3007. ...But everything changed in June of 1983.``
``...@k@vS20/00/VTT_machiko3014.What on earth happened?``

``Toxic volcanic gas was released from a swamp in the middle of the night, killing the entire village while they slept.@k@vS20/00/VTT_akuta3009. And in that single night, over 2,000 people had their lives taken from them...``
Anyone who saw the unthinkable, horrific state of that disaster with their own eyes must've been terrified of the destructive power of nature.
Japan has always had a lot of volcanoes. Even though volcanic zones can have periods of inactivity, there's no guarantee how long it'll be until they release their fury.
And geologically speaking, it's difficult to find a region that doesn't have any poison gasses lurking underground...
So, it was natural for people to think, ``It could happen in my town too...`` And as a result, cases of people suffering severe anxiety continued to pop up...
``...But that wasn't the only cause for commotion.``
Relatives of people from Hinamizawa village believed that the gas disaster was caused by their local god... and they started a commotion about the curse of ``Oyashiro-sama.``
And then, the people who were afraid of the curse started acting possessed, engaging in strange behavior, and involving surrounding people. In some cases, even carrying out bizarre murders.
Those incidents only exacerbated the fear and anxiety that people were feeling at the time...
``The curse... of Oyashiro-sama?``
``Right. And the people responded to that with an overblown, nationwide movement to disparage the people from that village.``

``In reality, this social ostracization was based on mere rumors, but it largely cut those people off from future prospects.@k@vS20/00/VTT_akuta3013. Even now, I've heard stories about people from that area struggling to find employment or marriage.``
``...It's like a witch hunt.``

``Exactly.@k@vS20/00/VTT_akuta3015. And Hinamizawa was at the heart of the entire uproar.@k@vS20/00/VTT_akuta3016. That's why it became a literal ghost town. The village was erased from Japanese history.``
The bliss I was feeling until a moment ago was cast aside. And so, I closed the window.
Something about the air started to feel wrong, and I suddenly began feeling nauseous.

``...Even afterwards, there were still random isolated bursts of gas.@k@vS20/00/VTT_akuta3018. It took over 20 years before the blockade on the area was lifted.@k@vS20/00/VTT_akuta3019. ...I think at this point, it's finally gone.``
``...It seems unreal.@k@vS20/00/VTT_chiaki3010. A beautiful village was completely smothered by toxic gas, and it happened recently too...@k@vS20/00/VTT_chiaki3011. I can hardly believe it.``
``...@k@vS20/41/VTT_otobe3033.I remembered something when you called it a ghost town.``
Just then, Otobe spoke up while playing with his cell phone in the passenger seat.
``This village... apparently ghosts appear here.@k@vS20/41/VTT_otobe3035. The villagers were killed in the middle of the night in the blink of an eye, so their spirits...``
Indeed, if they died so quickly that they didn't even know what was going on, their spirits might ``appear`` without ever knowing that they died.
But that's all right.
No matter what form they take, it's better than never seeing them again...

``A village of the dead, huh...?@k@vS20/00/VTT_machiko3020. I wonder if only the spirits of the villagers who died here can come out.@k@vS20/00/VTT_machiko3021. Can they not come here if they died somewhere else...?``
``...Machi-chan?``
Enough of that.
Either way, I'll meet them soon enough.
I'm sure I'll see everyone soon...
